title: GOPPUS 600ml/20oz Stainless Water Bottle with Straw Double Wall Insulated Bottles with Strap Reusable Vacuum Thermal Flask Leakproof Keep Cold Drinks Bottles with Flip Top Lid for Men Women BPA Free
features: 【Satisfaction Guarantee】-GOPPUS providing 1 year Satisfaction Guarantee. If you don't know how to contact us, please see the video in the image.

【Unbreakable Material】 The GOPPUS Stainless Steel Flask made by rust-resistant 18/8 Stainless Steel(304 food-grade stainless steel) inside and out, maintaining the taste and purity of your favorite drinks.
【Friendly Design】 The Lids With Built-in Carry Handle/strap and Leakproof, so taking these travel bottles on the go is easy and mess-free—no water rings or slippery hands.
【Environment Friendly】 Our GOPPUS Sports Flask is reusable and long-lasting. So you are actively reducing the waste of disposable bottles. Both Good for your wallet and nature.
【Vacuum Insulated Water Bottle】 Double wall insulation makes it sweat-free! Maintains temperature and keeps drinks cold for up to 24 hours and hot for up to 12 hours.
description: Product Description Perfect Design Easy to Hold with One Hand Designed for Children Fits Easily in a Backpack Suitable for Riding Suitable for Cycling Bottle Holder Portable Travel Suitable for Car Bottle Holder 600ml/20oz GOPPUS Water Bottles 304 Stainless Steel Main Material 304 Stainless Steel Double Layers Dustproof Straw Lid 304 Stainless Steel Main Material 304 Stainless Steel Double Layers Dustproof Straw Lid 304 Stainless Steel Main Material 304 Stainless Steel Double Layers Dustproof Straw Lid 304 Stainless Steel Main Material 304 Stainless Steel Double Layers Dustproof Straw Lid Previous page 420ml/12oz Kid Bottle Learn More 750ml/26oz Bottle Learn More 1000ml/32oz Bottle Learn More 1200ml/40oz Bottle Learn More Next page Can the GOPPUS insulated water bottle be cleaned in a dishwasher? Yes, GOPPUS bottles are dishwasher safe. However, it is recommended to wash the lid by hand, as washing them in the dishwasher may cause the lid to fall off or become deformed due to high temperatures, which may affect their sealing performance. What should I do if my GOPPUS insulated bottle lid is leaking? Please check if the seal ring and stopper are missing. If not, ensure the silicone seal is correctly placed. Misalignment can cause leaks. Adjust it first. If it still leaks or misses accessories, GOPPUS provide lid replacements. How can I contact GOPPUS? Check out the steps in the main video.
